summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Medikal Africa website ultra-minimalist redesign. All 6 key requirements successfully tested and verified. The design perfectly implements the minimalist aesthetic with exact color scheme requirements (#5EC4D5, #979797, #000000) and excellent mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with all required sections: hero, video, stats (4 items), features (6 cards), partners (3 logos), CTA, footer
Navigation works perfectly - all 4 main pages accessible (Home, Platform, AMR Intelligence, Research) plus Request Demo
Platform page loads with architecture diagram showing data flow visualization with 4 nodes and active AI Engine highlight
Request Demo form renders correctly with all fields: name, email, organization, country dropdown (7 options), message textarea
Form validation works - all required fields have proper HTML5 validation (name, email, org, country)
Mobile responsiveness excellent - hamburger menu opens/closes correctly with proper overlay and animations
Mobile layouts adapt perfectly: stats grid (2 columns), features grid (1 column), navigation switches to mobile menu
Color scheme matches exact requirements: Primary #5EC4D5, Gray #979797, Black #000000 verified in CSS variables
Typography uses Inter font family with proper weights (400, 500, 600) and letter spacing
Button hover effects work correctly - primary button changes from black to teal (#5EC4D5) on hover
All assets load successfully: Medikal logo (256x81px), 3 partner logos (Africa CDC, AMR Initiative Rwanda, RoboLabs)
Video element has proper controls and poster image, source points to demo-video.mp4
Responsive breakpoints work correctly: desktop (1920px), tablet (768px), mobile (390px)
Data-testid attributes present on all interactive elements for automated testing
No JavaScript errors detected during any testing phases
Clean minimalist design achieved with proper whitespace and simplified content per section
success_percentage: 100% - All frontend functionality and design requirements working perfectly
